assertions.description: clip-path accepts a shape() function with line verbs.
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0% 0%, line to 100% 0%, line to 100% 100%, line to 0% 100%, close)

assertions.description: shape() supports cubic curve verbs ('curve to ... with ...').
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0% 50%, curve to 100% 50% with 50% 0%, close)

assertions.description: shape() supports the arc verb with radius and sweep/rotation flags.
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0% 0%, arc to 50% 50% of 50% 50%, close)

assertions.description: shape() accepts percentage / vw units (the responsiveness it adds over path()).
assertions.test: clip-path: shape(from 0% 0%, line to 50vw 0%, line to 0% 100%, close)

assertions.description: shape() accepts CSS custom properties via var() — a key difference from path().
Pre-existing path() function still accepted on clip-path (shape() is additive).
assertions.test: clip-path: path('M0 0 L100 0 L100 100 L0 100 Z')
